raw_text: maider agirrezabal igarza telecommunications engineer profile proactive, autodidact, and skills such as teamwork and good communication, with ease of interpersonal relationships. positive attitude towards any situation and temperance in situations of stress. excellent seeker of alternatives to reach the same goal. besides being curious and open-minded. hard skills programming languages c, c#, java electronic systems labview, quartus, arduino signal processing matlab soft skills commitment you are not going to find anyone with more commitment than me, and i consider that to be very important. problem-solving skills if there is a problem, i will find a way to solve it. adaptability i think i have many skills that the master asks for and i am willing to do whatever it takes to be able to measure up to what is needed. languages french: intermediate catalan: intermediate english: advanced spanish: native basque: native career summary software developer construcciones y auxiliares de ferrocarriles (caf) feb. 2020 to present e develop and implement an application for projects management e test and validate the application hardware & test engineer fides mar. 2019 to july 2019 e tested and refined software prior to rollout ict informatic mobile world congress (mwc) jan. 2018 to mar. 2018 e configure communication equipment e solve network connection problems teacher particular classes jan. 2017 to oct. 2017 e math teacher for master's access educational training polytechnic university of catalonia (upc) telecommunication technologies and services engineering degree e attended from sept. 2014 to oct. 2020 8 belts online english course e attended from mar. 2020 to present ficosa automotive embedded systems e attended from feb. 2018 to mar. 2018 how to reach me email: maideragirrezabal@gmail.com linkedin: maider agirrezabal igarza phone: +34 669 091 433
